NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONTRERAS, DANIEL (RESPONDENT) AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR,TOM, TAYLOR COMMERCIAL INTERIORS (APPELLANT STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER

JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-13-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 503

JUDGE JOSEPH A. DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK, P.D0WLING/CSR 09:24AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. COURT ORDERS BOTH #160087 AND #160137 CONSOLIDATED. THE RESPONDENT, DANIEL CONTRERAS, IS PRESENT IN PRO PER. THE APPELLANT, TOM TAYLOR, IS PRESENT IN PRO PER. WITNESSES S&E AND EXHIBITS IDENTIFIED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. COURT TAKES MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR,TOM, TAYLOR COMMERCIAL INTERIORS (APPELLANT THE APPELLANT TOM TAYLOR TAKE NOTHING BY HIS APPEAL. THE RESPONDENT DANIEL CONTRERAS RECOVER THE COSTS OF SUIT THROUGH A COST BILL.
